wordplay_note: Seth's wife who is murdered during the colony's disintegration
card_description: Mary Morley is a character in Philip K. Dick's *A Maze of Death*. Seth Morley's wife and fellow colonist on Delmak-O. Name note: Seth's wife who is murdered during the colony's disintegration. Domestic bond under cosmic threat. First appears in *A Maze of Death*.

reference.brief: Seth Morley's wife and fellow colonist on Delmak-O
